system.description:
Staying alive in the wilderness. This also covers outdoor skills such as tracking, foraging, and fishing.
  • Surviving in inclement weather: Survival/EDU 8+
  • Tracking prey through the brush: Survival/INT 8+
  • Knowing what plants are safe to consume in the wild: Survival/EDU 8+
  • Predicting bad weather: Survival/EDU 12+
system.shortdescr: Wilderness survival, tracking, foraging, and fishing.
